title: Country Club Bamboo Pegs Pack of 24
features: Bamboo Clothes pegs are perfect for hanging clothes, sealing packets of food, holding things up and for many other uses
This pack of 20 pegs are made of sustainable bamboo and a steel spring
These pegs are a sustainable alternative to plastic pegs, the bamboo is biodegradable and the steel springs are endlessly recyclable
